---
title: "Project Setup and Model Development"
format: html
---

```{r}
#| label: Load Packages
#| warning: false
#| message: false

library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(brms)
```

```{r}
#| label: load-data

source(here("R", "data", "load_data.R"))
data <- load_data()
```

```{r}
#| label: build-team-games

source(here("R", "data", "build_team_games.R"))
team_games <- build_team_games(data$reg_season_results)
```

```{r}
#| label: build-team-season-features

source(here("R", "features", "build_team_season_features.R"))
team_season_features <- build_team_season_features(team_games)
```

```{r}
#| label: build-team-season-features-adjusted

source(here("R", "features", "build_team_season_features_adjusted.R"))
team_season_features_adjusted <- build_team_season_features_adjusted(team_games)
```

```{r}
#| label: build-matchup-training-data

source(here("R", "features", "build_matchup_training_data.R"))
matchup_training_data <- build_matchup_training_data(
  tourney_results = data$tourney_results,
  team_season_features = team_season_features,
  seeds = data$seeds)
```

```{r}
#| label: build-matchup-training-data-adjusted

source(here("R", "features", "build_matchup_training_data_adjusted.R"))
matchup_training_data_adjusted <- build_matchup_training_data_adjusted(
  tourney_results = data$tourney_results,
  team_season_features = team_season_features_adjusted,
  seeds = data$seeds)
```

```{r}
#| label: train-test-split

train_data <- matchup_training_data %>%
  filter(Season <= 2021)

test_data <- matchup_training_data %>%
  filter(Season >= 2022)
```

```{r}
#| label: fit-model-01-logistic

source(here("R", "models", "fit_model_01_logistic.R"))
model_01_logistic <- fit_model_01_logistic(train_data)

summary(model_01_logistic)
```

```{r}
#| label: source-rolling-brier-eval

source(here("R", "evaluation", "rolling_brier_eval.R"))
```

```{r}
#| label: rolling-brier-model-01

rolling_brier_01 <- rolling_brier_eval(
  data = matchup_training_data,
  fit_function = fit_model_01_logistic,
  test_seasons = c(2016:2019, 2021:2025))

rolling_brier_01

rolling_brier_01 %>%
  summarise(
    mean = mean(Brier),
    median = median(Brier),
    sd = sd(Brier),
    min = min(Brier),
    max = max(Brier))
```

```{r}
#| label: fit-model-02-efficiency

source(here("R", "models", "fit_model_02_efficiency.R"))
model_02_efficiency <- fit_model_02_efficiency(train_data)

summary(model_02_efficiency)
```

```{r}
#| label: rolling-brier-model-02

rolling_brier_02 <- rolling_brier_eval(
  data = matchup_training_data,
  fit_function = fit_model_02_efficiency,
  test_seasons = c(2016:2019, 2021:2025))

rolling_brier_02

rolling_brier_02 %>%
  summarise(
    mean = mean(Brier),
    median = median(Brier),
    sd = sd(Brier),
    min = min(Brier),
    max = max(Brier))
```

```{r}
#| label: train-test-split-adjusted
 
train_data_adjusted <- matchup_training_data_adjusted %>%
  filter(Season <= 2021)

test_data_adjusted <- matchup_training_data_adjusted %>%
  filter(Season >= 2022)
```

```{r}
#| label: fit-model-02b-adj-efficiency

source(here("R", "models", "fit_model_02b_adj_efficiency.R"))
model_02b_adj_efficiency <- fit_model_02b_adj_efficiency(train_data_adjusted)

summary(model_02b_adj_efficiency)
```

```{r}
#| label: rolling-brier-model-02b

rolling_brier_02b <- rolling_brier_eval(
  data = matchup_training_data_adjusted,
  fit_function = fit_model_02b_adj_efficiency,
  test_seasons = c(2016:2019, 2021:2025))

rolling_brier_02b

rolling_brier_02b %>%
  summarise(
    mean = mean(Brier),
    median = median(Brier),
    sd = sd(Brier),
    min = min(Brier),
    max = max(Brier))
```

```{r}
#| label: rolling-brier-comparison

rolling_brier_comparison <- bind_rows(
  rolling_brier_01 %>% 
    mutate(Model = "Model 1"),
  rolling_brier_02 %>% 
    mutate(Model = "Model 2"),
  rolling_brier_02b %>% 
    mutate(Model = "Model 2B")) %>%
  group_by(Model) %>%
  summarise(
    mean = mean(Brier),
    median = median(Brier),
    sd = sd(Brier),
    .groups = "drop")

rolling_brier_comparison
```

```{r}
#| label: build-team-rankings-2026

team_rankings_2026 <- team_season_features_adjusted %>%
  filter(Season == 2026) %>%
  left_join(data$teams, by = "TeamID") %>%
  arrange(desc(AdjNetEff)) %>%
  mutate(Rank = row_number()) %>%
  select(
    Rank,
    TeamID,
    TeamName,
    AdjNetEff,
    AdjOffEff,
    AdjDefEff,
    AdjSOS,
    GamesPlayed)

team_rankings_2026
```

```{r}
#| label: fill-csv

csv <- read_csv(here("data", "raw", "2026_Potential_Matchups.csv"))

team_strength_2026 <- team_season_features_adjusted %>%
  filter(Season == 2026) %>%
  select(TeamID, AdjNetEff)

filled_csv <- csv %>%
  left_join(
    team_strength_2026 %>%
      rename(
        HigherSeedID = TeamID,
        HigherSeed_AdjNetEff = AdjNetEff),
    by = "HigherSeedID") %>%
  left_join(
    team_strength_2026 %>%
      rename(
        LowerSeedID = TeamID,
        LowerSeed_AdjNetEff = AdjNetEff),
    by = "LowerSeedID") %>%
  mutate(
    AdjNetEffDiff = HigherSeed_AdjNetEff - LowerSeed_AdjNetEff,
    Predictions = predict(
      model_02b_adj_efficiency,
      newdata = tibble(AdjNetEffDiff = AdjNetEffDiff),
      type = "response")) %>%
  select(
    HigherSeed,
    HigherSeedID,
    HigherSeedNum,
    LowerSeed,
    LowerSeedID,
    LowerSeedNum,
    Predictions)

filled_csv
```

```{r}
#| label: export-submission-csv

write_csv(filled_csv, here("data", "processed", "joseph-corritone-mm2026-analytics-competition.csv"))
```
